name: Dried Beef and Noodle Casserole
recipeIngredient: 10 3/4 oz Can Cream Of Mushroom Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover and microwave dried beef and 1 cup water in a 2-quart casserole on high (100%) to boiling, 2 to 3 minutes; drain.
2. Stir in onion, noodles, soup, milk, water, and parsley flakes. Cover and microwave for 10 minutes; stir.
3. Cover and microwave until noodles are tender, 5 to 6 minutes.
4. Stir in cheese. Cover and microwave until melted, 2 to 3 minutes. Let stand 5 minutes before serving.
